title: Haunting in Japan
original_title: บุปผาอาริกาโตะ
overview: A Thai rock band travel to Japan to shoot a new snow-bound music video. Unfortunately, the band discover that the house they have rented for the shoot is haunted by a female ghost. So, they call in an exorcist.
